text: They are broken things upon the doorstep of salvation.
Viridian's breath is a shallow rasp, each one a small victory.
But there, etched into the living rock, is the gateway, the shrine of Ethelgard.
Its light is not of the sun or moon, but something older, something gentle.
It spills out like liquid hope, offering warmth after the wind's cruel bite.
They have crossed the threshold of the world.
Now, they must cross the last few feet.
